added_items.final_wording: Supports structured adult panic-disorder diagnosis, history, comorbidity review, panic presentations, and proportionate investigation to exclude acute physical problems before primary-care follow-up.

source.title: Generalised anxiety disorder and panic disorder in adults: management — Recommendations
source.population: Adults with known or suspected generalised anxiety disorder or panic disorder.
source.setting: Primary, community, and specialist mental-health care.
source.exclusions: Exact for adult GAD identification, assessment, stepped care, risk, and clinician-led management; not exact for children, every anxiety subtype, or UAE pathways.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.3.1–1.3.5 — diagnosis, presentation, and exclusion of acute physical problems

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports structured adult panic-disorder diagnosis, history, comorbidity review, panic presentations, and proportionate investigation to exclude acute physical problems before primary-care follow-up.

added_items.rationale: Supports panic presentation review and exclusion of acute physical problems for panic symptoms follow-up; no decision is generated.

added_items.final_wording: Supports clinician-documented discussion of psychological and medication options, patient preference, information, monitoring, self-help, referral, and follow-up without autonomous treatment output or doses.

source.title: Generalised anxiety disorder and panic disorder in adults: management — Recommendations
source.population: Adults with known or suspected generalised anxiety disorder or panic disorder.
source.setting: Primary, community, and specialist mental-health care.
source.exclusions: Exact for adult GAD identification, assessment, stepped care, risk, and clinician-led management; not exact for children, every anxiety subtype, or UAE pathways.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.3.6–1.3.25 — clinician-led treatment and shared decisions

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports clinician-documented discussion of psychological and medication options, patient preference, information, monitoring, self-help, referral, and follow-up without autonomous treatment output or doses.

added_items.rationale: Supports clinician-led treatment review and shared decisions for panic symptoms follow-up; no decision is generated.

added_items.final_wording: Supports reassessment of prior treatment and concordance, substance use, comorbidity, function, social support, stressors, avoidance, comprehensive risk, side effects, efficacy, and a shared care plan.

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports reassessment of prior treatment and concordance, substance use, comorbidity, function, social support, stressors, avoidance, comprehensive risk, side effects, efficacy, and a shared care plan.

added_items.rationale: Supports reassessment, risk and specialist-care context for panic symptoms follow-up; no decision is generated.
